title: Kohn denies being a con artist - vows to repay
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Richelle Kohn, who has been...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Richelle Kohn, who has been accused of fleecing clients, has rejected most of the allegations against her, saying she only borrowed money "from friends".","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Richelle Kohn, who has been accused of fleecing clients, has rejected most of the allegations against her, saying she only borrowed money "from friends"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kohn said she had promised to repay the money to "EO and JK", two people quoted in a News24 article last week, but they had proceeded to make allegations against her.","html":"Kohn said she had promised to repay the money to "EO and JK", two people quoted in a News24 article last week, but they had proceeded to make allegations against her."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The two have reported her to the Financial Advisory and Intermediary Services ( FAIS) Ombud."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kohn said that, since an article was published by News24, she has had to face a barrage of scrutiny and was afraid to even leave her home.","html":"Kohn said that, since an article was published by News24, she has had to face a barrage of scrutiny and was afraid to even leave her home."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One-sided","html":"One-sided"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She said the article was one-sided and did not include relevant information she had provided to News24.","html":"She said the article was one-sided and did not include relevant information she had provided to News24."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""The article has caused me incredible reputational damage and I have consulted with my lawyer," said Kohn.","html":""The article has caused me incredible reputational damage and I have consulted with my lawyer," said Kohn."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""I admit I borrowed money from people and I have promised to repay them. There is nothing like me fleecing clients and looking for the next victim. I have stayed in Knysna and not fled anywhere."","html":""I admit I borrowed money from people and I have promised to repay them. There is nothing like me fleecing clients and looking for the next victim. I have stayed in Knysna and not fled anywhere.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The allegations against her were made in the News24 article by two unidentified individuals "EO and JK", whose allegations were published anonymously.","html":"The allegations against her were made in the News24 article by two unidentified individuals "EO and JK", whose allegations were published anonymously."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"High ground","html":"High ground"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kohn said she was sent an email in which the two threatened to go public, which she considered was "blackmail".","html":"Kohn said she was sent an email in which the two threatened to go public, which she considered was "blackmail"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The email contains evidence of private matters that she did not want to "put out there, and start a mudslinging match".","html":"The email contains evidence of private matters that she did not want to "put out there, and start a mudslinging match"."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The reason for her not spelling it out is that she wants to retain the high ground in what, she says, has become a personal vendetta against her."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She has known her accusers "for a very long time" and regarded them as friends and colleagues.","html":"She has known her accusers "for a very long time" and regarded them as friends and colleagues."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She believes the relationships soured because she, admittedly, broke client privilege and spoke about personal medical matters behind someone's back.","html":"She believes the relationships soured because she, admittedly, broke client privilege and spoke about personal medical matters behind someone's back."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to News24, the two women recently sounded a clarion call on social media - without naming Kohn - in a bid to determine if they were the only ones. According to them, over 30 people - ranging from former clients to colleagues in the coastal town - reached out, claiming Kohn had financially crippled them by asking for money and paying little to nothing back.","html":"According to News24, the two women recently sounded a clarion call on social media - without naming Kohn - in a bid to determine if they were the only ones. According to them, over 30 people - ranging from former clients to colleagues in the coastal town - reached out, claiming Kohn had financially crippled them by asking for money and paying little to nothing back."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the News24 article, Kohn denies owing that many people money, claiming she is only indebted to nine people for a cumulative R610 000.","html":"According to the News24 article, Kohn denies owing that many people money, claiming she is only indebted to nine people for a cumulative R610 000."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Allegations","html":"Allegations"},{"type":"paragraph","text":""If there are allegedly 30 people, why has no one else come forward?","html":""If there are allegedly 30 people, why has no one else come forward?"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They would have my number," said Kohn. "The allegations of leaving clients in the lurch are untrue - I always had the intention of repaying the loans. When the issue was elevated to social media, my name was not mentioned - but when they went to News24 they knew my name would be mentioned."","html":"They would have my number," said Kohn. "The allegations of leaving clients in the lurch are untrue - I always had the intention of repaying the loans. When the issue was elevated to social media, my name was not mentioned - but when they went to News24 they knew my name would be mentioned.""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She said she felt badgered by EO and JK, and asked why they had not identified themselves."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kohn added that she received correspon-dence from the ombud to reach a settlement among themselves and that her lawyer had started the process.","html":"Kohn added that she received correspon-dence from the ombud to reach a settlement among themselves and that her lawyer had started the process."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna-Plett Herald has requested comment from FAIS Ombud Adv John Simpson and as soon as it is received, it will be added.","html":"Knysna-Plett Herald has requested comment from FAIS Ombud Adv John Simpson and as soon as it is received, it will be added."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Kohn denies being a con artist - vows to repay
